bird.name: Yellow-crested helmetshrike
bird.summary: The yellow-crested helmetshrike (Prionops alberti) or King Albert's helmetshrike is a species of bird in the Vanga family Vangidae. This la…

relations.subject: Yellow-crested helmetshrike
relations.evidence: Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forest in the Albertine Rift, largely between the elevations of 1120–2500 m in elevation.{{cite journal |last1=Bober |first1=S
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: Yellow-crested helmetshrike
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
